items.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
items.summary: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
